mayTake: This may take up to a minute
previewFailedGeneric: Something went wrong while generating the preview.

queue.title: Your preview is queued
queue.position: Position {{position}} in queue. Another build is in progress.
queue.waiting: Waiting for a build slot to open up.

modal.title: Building your preview
modal.subtitle: Hang tight — we're assembling a live ERP just for you.
modal.queueWaiting: Waiting for a build slot to open up...
modal.errorSubtitle: We couldn't finish building your ERP.

errors.previewBuildFailed: Preview build failed. Please try again.
errors.tooLong: Generation took too long. Your inputs are saved — please try again.
errors.unreachable: Our AI service is temporarily unreachable. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.highDemand: We're experiencing high demand. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.unexpectedFormat: The AI produced an unexpected format. Please try generating again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong during generation. Please try again.
errors.queueFull: Too many previews are being built right now. Please try again in a minute.
errors.capacity: The preview server is at full capacity. Please close an existing preview or try again shortly.
errors.noSdf: No ERP structure found for this project yet. Generate one before previewing.
errors.assembleFailed: Couldn't assemble the ERP code. Please try again — if this keeps happening, tweak the project and regenerate.
errors.npmInstallFailed: Failed to install dependencies for the preview. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.frontendBuildFailed: Couldn't build the preview interface. Try regenerating the ERP or tweaking the structure.
errors.portTimeout: The preview server didn't start in time. Please try again.
errors.crashed: The preview server crashed unexpectedly. Please try again.
errors.stale: This preview expired. Start a new preview to continue.
errors.notFound: Preview not found. Please start a new preview.
errors.unauthorized: You're not authorized to view this preview.
errors.spawnFailed: The preview server couldn't start. Please try again.

changePanel.title: Request Changes
changePanel.subtitle: Describe what you'd like changed and we'll regenerate your ERP.
changePanel.placeholder: e.g. Add an expiry date field to products, change the invoice layout to show tax separately...

downloadModal.choosePlatform: Choose the operating system you'll run this ERP on.
downloadModal.buildingFor: Building for {{platform}}. This may take a few minutes.
downloadModal.startedBody: Your ERP has been approved and the download should begin automatically.

leaveConfirm.title: Leave preview?
leaveConfirm.buildingMessage: Leaving now will cancel this build. Are you sure?
leaveConfirm.runningMessage: Leaving will shut down the preview to free up server resources.
